current_approach: Phase 1 — DNS Infrastructure: De Giorgi theory + computation spec

approaches_tried.name: Phase 1 — DNS Infrastructure: Adapt Atlas solver + validate
approaches_tried.outcome: Solver validated (task-001). De Giorgi theory analysis in progress (task-002).

tasks_completed.spec_summary: Set up pseudospectral DNS solver on T^3, validate on Taylor-Green vortex, add pressure field computation
tasks_completed.key_finding: Solver validated. Pressure L^{3/2} stabilizes at Re=1000 (~3.0-3.5) while enstrophy grows to 1556. N=64 adequate for Re=100, underresolved for Re=1000.
